## Rules

- `Fix` legend:
  - `рџ”§` = autofixable
  - `рџ’Ў` = suggestions available
  - `вЂ”` = report only
- `Preset key` legend: `рџџў minimal` В· `рџџЎ recommended` В· `рџџ  recommended-type-checked` В· `рџ”ґ strict` В· `рџџЈ all` В· `рџ’  type-fest/types` В· `вњґпёЏ ts-extras/type-guards`
